sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) Raised to "Buy" at Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has upgraded Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) from "hold" to "buy," joining several other firms that have raised price targets, resulting in a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with a target of $127.13. Merck beat Q4 earnings and revenue estimates and set strong FY2026 EPS guidance, while also announcing a $6.7 billion acquisition of Terns Pharmaceuticals to enhance its oncology pipeline ahead of Keytruda's patent expiration. However, concerns about the Terns deal and Keytruda's loss of exclusivity introduce some risks, despite overall positive investor sentiment.

feed.summary: State Street (STT) secured a significant mandate to provide end-to-end servicing for Dimensional Fund Advisors' new ETF share class structure, marking the first such arrangement approved in the U.S. This deal reinforces State Street's established global partnership with Dimensional and highlights its extensive experience in the rapidly growing ETF market. Despite a recent share price dip, State Street's long-term performance remains strong, and the company is currently trading at an estimated 28% discount to its intrinsic value, with analysts anticipating future growth driven by its ETF servicing and SPDR ETF franchise.

feed.title: Chipotle is coming to Fort Dodge
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill is expanding its presence in Iowa with a new location in Fort Dodge, set to open later this year. Construction has already begun in Corridor Plaza, and the restaurant is expected to hire around 30 employees, offering benefits such as bonuses and a debt-free college plan. This will be the 17th Chipotle in Iowa and the closest one for Fort Dodge residents, with the nearest currently in Ames.

feed.title: MegaCon Orlando livestream drive sees eBay stock fall 1.62%

Technical analysis indicates short- and medium-term downside pressure with low trend strength, suggesting seller dominance and a potential trading range of $86.50 to $91.75 for the coming week. Investors are advised to monitor eBay's continued engagement in the collectibles market through events like MegaCon, as sustained momentum in this segment could be a significant catalyst for future growth.

feed.title: Entergy (ETR) Rallies 6.8% on Meta Deal
feed.summary: Entergy (ETR) stock rallied 6.8% after securing a deal with Meta Platforms for a hyperscale data center in Northeast Louisiana. This agreement will result in significant customer savings, potentially up to $2.65 billion, as Meta will cover the full cost of service and contribute to various energy initiatives, including up to 2,500 megawatts of additional solar energy. The deal strengthens reliability, supports economic development, and aligns with both companies' pledges for affordable energy rates and ratepayer protection.

feed.title: First Majestic (AG) Climbs 7% on Silver Rush

Investors are turning to mining stocks like First Majestic as silver and gold prices increase amidst rising Middle East tensions. The company, a major silver producer with operations in Mexico and the US, posted a net income of $211 million last year and a 124% revenue increase.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Q1 2026 Earnings: Projected $6.62 EPS, Stock Performance & Analyst Outlook - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Analysts predict UnitedHealth Group will report a Q1 2026 profit of $6.62 per share, a decrease from the prior year. The company's stock has underperformed, especially after a Q4 2025 revenue miss attributed to high medical costs and anticipated Medicare Advantage membership reduction. Despite past mixed performance against estimates, current analyst sentiment is moderately optimistic with buy recommendations.

feed.title: WYHG Stock Price, News & Analysis
feed.summary: Wing Yip Food Holdings Group Limited (WYHG) is a meat product processing company based in Hong Kong with operations in mainland China, specializing in cured, snack, and frozen meat products under brands like "Wing Yip," "Jiangwang," and "Kuangke." Its ADSs trade on Nasdaq, while ordinary shares are on KOSDAQ, though it recently received a Nasdaq notification regarding minimum bid price non-compliance. The article provides an overview of the company's business model, financials, stock performance, and recent news, including discussions around its potential strategies to regain Nasdaq compliance.

feed.title: Vanguard realignment leaves WSFS holdings at 0 (WSFS)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, reporting zero beneficial ownership of WSFS Financial Corp shares following an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026. This change means that certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately, in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538, rather than indicating a sale of WSFS shares. The filing, signed by Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration, emphasizes a recalculation of reporting responsibilities, not a market transaction.

feed.title: John Deere & Tarter USA Introduce Frontier Flex Wing Rotary Cutters
feed.summary: John Deere and Tarter USA have announced a strategic manufacturing partnership to collaboratively develop and produce a new line of American-made Frontier Flex Wing Rotary Cutters. This collaboration has resulted in initial order volumes exceeding first-year forecasts, with manufacturing based in Tarter USA's advanced production facility in Liberty, Kentucky, creating 26 new jobs. The partnership leverages John Deere's understanding of customer needs and Tarter's manufacturing expertise to deliver high-quality, durable products for the agricultural market.

feed.title: Motorola Solutions: C$675 Million Acquisition Of Land Mobile Radio Business From BCE Subsidiary Bell
feed.summary: Motorola Solutions is set to acquire the land mobile radio networks services business from Bell Canada, a subsidiary of BCE Inc., for C$675 million. This acquisition aims to enhance the resilience and security of mission-critical communications in Canada, building on a three-decade partnership between the two companies. The deal is expected to close in Q4 2026, pending regulatory approvals.

feed.title: BioLineRx: Advancing GLIX1 and Motixafortide Pipeline with Strengthened IP and Legal Position Underpinning Buy Rating and $12 Target
feed.summary: JonesTrading analyst Justin Walsh reiterated a Buy rating for BioLineRx with a $12 price target, citing strategic advancements in its pipeline. The company has initiated a Phase I/IIa study for GLIX1 in glioblastoma, with initial data expected in H1 2027, and is accelerating enrollment for a Phase IIb trial of motixafortide for metastatic pancreatic cancer. Additionally, new U.S. intellectual property protection for GLIX1 and a favorable arbitration ruling against Biokine Therapeutics further strengthen BioLineRx's competitive and legal standing.

feed.title: How to Prevent Disruption and Recover Quickly When it Matters Most
feed.summary: This article discusses the critical importance of cyber resilience in preventing and recovering from cyberattacks, highlighting that downtime is the true cost of such incidents. The author details strategies for achieving endpoint and access resilience, including persistent visibility, automatic restoration of critical controls, and firmware-based remediation, to ensure business continuity amidst escalating geopolitical cyber threats.

feed.title: Howie, Williams Sonoma CFO, sells $5.9m in WSM stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Jeffrey Howie, CFO of Williams-Sonoma Inc (NYSE:WSM), sold 31,064 shares of company stock worth approximately $5.9 million on March 26, 2026. Despite the sale, Howie still directly owns 34,138 shares and also acquired 10,077 restricted stock units. This news follows recent strong fiscal fourth-quarter earnings for Williams-Sonoma, which outperformed analyst estimates.

feed.title: Phillips 66 progresses Coastal Bend initiatives to enhance integration of NGL and downstream operations
feed.summary: Phillips 66 has completed its Coastal Bend project, integrating the former EPIC NGL business into its midstream segment to enhance connectivity between upstream supply and downstream demand. This integration, encompassing pipelines, fractionation capacity, and digital platforms, aims to minimize inefficiencies and maximize future profitability in its NGL value chain. The company is evaluating further expansions, including a potential 100 kbd fractionator in Corpus Christi, reinforcing its strategy of growth through connectivity and utilization.

feed.title: Trip.com Group Limited Securities Fraud Class Action Result of Antitrust Probe and 19% Stock Decline - Investors may Contact Lewis Kahn, Esq, at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) is reminding investors of Trip.com Group Limited (TCOM) who incurred substantial losses to file lead plaintiff applications by May 11, 2026, in a securities class action lawsuit. This action follows allegations of Trip.com "abusing its market position and engaging in monopolistic practices" by China's State Administration for Market Regulations, which caused a significant stock decline. Investors who purchased securities between April 30, 2024, and January 13, 2026, are encouraged to contact KSF to discuss their legal rights.

feed.title: Gartner, Inc. Securities Fraud Class Action Result of Reduced Guidance Disclosure and 48% Stock Decline - Investors may Contact Lewis Kahn, Esq, at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) has initiated a securities class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) following a 48% stock decline. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner and its executives failed to disclose material information, leading to significant stock drops after two separate disclosures of reduced contract value growth. Investors who purchased Gartner shares between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, are encouraged to contact KSF to discuss their legal rights and potentially serve as a lead plaintiff by May 18, 2026.
